texto_original: Thank you! <FF05><1E00>You're
Yuka, right?<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>I wish we'd met and become friends
<FF05><1E00><FF03>while I was still alive!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>To tell you the truth
<FF05><1E00>I was scared!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>I used to hang out with my friends,<FF03>and we'd go out and have fun

<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>I had a lot of friends and a lot of guys<FF03>who said they liked me!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>Plus, my mom and dad were really sweet!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>Every day was fun, and I was so happy
<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>I thought, <0028>It just doesn't get better<FF03>than this.<0028><FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>But then
I got scared
<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03><0028>If it doesn't get better than this
<FF03>Is it all downhill from here?<0028><FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03><0028>For the rest of my life
<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03><0028>Will I ever be happier than I am now?<0028><FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03><0028>Am I just gonna grow up, get old, turn<FF03>ugly
and die
notas: baja densidad de texto (posible mezcla con datos)

texto_original: <FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>I couldn't shake those questions! I got<FF03>so scared, I couldn't sleep at night

<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>That's when the Snow Queen's mask I wore<FF03>in the play spoke to me!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>It said, <0028>I can help you live forever,<FF03>exactly as you are now!<0028><FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>Before I knew it, I was in this tower
<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>And I've been here ever since
<FF03>all by myself
<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>Mom
My friends

texto_original: All gone!<FF03>Just me
I was so selfish.<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>I was stupid for not wanting to die or<FF03>grow old. Every human has to.<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>That's why I fell for the Snow Queen's<FF03>offer
<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>I was such an idiot.<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>I felt empty, being on my own for so<FF03>long
I wanted to just end it all.<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>I couldn't stand it anymore.<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>That's why
when you guys showed up
<FF05><1E00><FF03>I was really happy.<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>I'd finally be able to put an end to<FF03>this
one way or another
<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>I wouldn't have to be alone anymore.<FF05><1E00><FF03>That's why I
<FF02><FF01>  <FF1B>Nanjo<FF03>Hmph

texto_original: I see!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Nanjo<FF03>Your egotistic, spoiled nature was the<FF03>source of your tremendous power!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Nanjo<FF03>In your state of absolute solitude, that<FF03>already unbearable sorrow and regret

<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Nanjo<FF03>It was amplified and warped by the<FF03>seemingly infinite time you spent here!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Nanjo<FF03>The result was boundless sorrow--far more<FF03>intense than your initial despair!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Nanjo<FF03>Thus was born your eccentric demeanor,<FF03>providing Thanatos with power!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Nanjo<FF03>What a fine mess it created. Though
<FF03>I suppose it's understandable!<FF02><FF01><FF1B>Elly<FF03>So that overwhelming power that seemed<FF03>almost unnatural
<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Elly<FF03>It came from your unfathomable sadness
<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Elly<FF03>The utter loneliness and bottomless grief<FF03>you felt

<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Elly<FF03>That gave rise to despair far stronger<FF03>than any of your prior feelings!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Elly<FF03>Combined with your sadness, that was the<FF03>root of both your peculiar attitude
<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Elly<FF03>

and the frightening power of your<FF03>Persona, Thanatos!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Elly<FF03>I see now, Yuriko, that you too were<FF03>a victim of the Snow Queen!<FF02><FF01>   <FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>But it's finally over
<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>I can't thank you enough!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>Thanks to all of you
<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>I can die
feeling like a human
<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Yuriko<FF03>I
